steps.t: Berries may be found along the forest paths in the Mournshaws. Umfrë suggests that you gather berries as a tithe to the Derudh of the Mournshaws befor…
The Derudh of the Mournshaws may be found at a stone circle called Galar Culch to the south of Echad Daervunn. Umfrë told you to approach the Derudh w…
Enit is at Galar Culch, south of Echad Daervunn. Enit the Derudh may know a way through the Mournshaws into Dunland.
